info.title: D365ODataCsdlShortener
info.description: Dynamics 365 Finance / Supply Chain Management (D365F&O/SCM) OData CSDL $metadata shortener is a command line tool that makes it easy to make a CSDL file shorter

options.name: --csdlSourceFilePath
options.description: - a CSDL file path in the local filesystem or a valid URL hosted on an HTTPS server

options.name: --csdlEntitySetFilter
options.description: - a filter parameter that user can use to select a subset of data entities from a large CSDL file. By providing a comma separated list of EntitySet names that appear in the EntityContainer

options.name: --csdlActionFilter
options.description: - a filter parameter that user can use to select a subset of data entity actions from a large CSDL file.By providing a comma separated list of Action names

options.name: --csdlTransformedFilePath
options.description: - an output directory path for the transformed file

options.name: --log-level
options.description: - the log level to use when logging messages to the main output [default: Information]
